title: Fix SIGABRT on reference to generate block function

features.name: hierarchical function call to function inside generate block
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical function call to a function defined inside a generate block, where the function is called from outside the generate block using block_name.func() syntax

features.name: function definition inside generate block
features.description: Code should include a function definition nested inside a named generate block
features.snippet:
generate
  block: begin
    function int f(int x);
      return x;
    endfunction
  end
endgenerate
